summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Glowmatch completed via Playwright. All key flows (homepage, mega menu, comparator with criteria popup + product grid + sort + wishlist toggle, AI try-on Step 1 + Step 2 reveal after upload, wishlist persistence) pass. All required data-testids present.
action_items: Minor React console warning: "`key` is not a prop" originating from a Section component (likely a parent forwarding `key` as a regular prop). Non-blocking but should be cleaned up.

Review request mentioned `menu-item-makeup-match-test` test id, but the actual catalog uses product slugs (creme-hydratante, serum, rouge-a-levres, etc.). The implementation correctly uses pattern `menu-item-{slug}`; the slug `makeup-match-test` does not exist. Confirm intended slug list with PM if `makeup-match-test` was expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Header mega menu uses hover (onMouseEnter / onMouseLeave) only — not keyboard / touch accessible. Consider adding click + focus handling for a11y and mobile.
HomePage podium-section is conditionally rendered (top.length>0); if /products/top ever returns empty, the section silently disappears. Consider a skeleton/empty state.
Console shows React warning about `key` being passed as prop on Section — track down and fix the offending iteration to remove warning noise.
seed_data_creation: None — used built-in catalog. Wishlist test added Terracotta Lip Crayon via UI which persisted to /wishlist correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend fully verified via external preview URL. Verified testids on homepage (hero-section, how-it-works, modules-section, podium-section, ai-banner, site-footer, site-header, wishlist-link, menu-visage/corps/cosmetiques, hero-cta-compare/ai), mega menu (megamenu-visage, megamenu-cosmetiques each opened on hover; ~12 menu-item-{slug} links), comparator (criteria-popup, criteria-submit, products-grid, 5 product-card-{id}, see-product-{id}, wishlist-toggle-{id} on hover, sort-select), AI try-on (upload-zone visible in Step 1; after uploading a tiny test JPEG via file input, Step 2 reveals preset-natural, free-prompt, ai-budget-slider, generate-look). Generate-look intentionally NOT clicked. Wishlist toggle from comparator persists to /wishlist page. One React `key` prop warning in console — minor.
